hero.desc: Discover a refined fragrance exhibition where elegance meets creativity—explore exclusive scents and meet world-class perfumers.

about.desc: After more than 20 years, the perfume exhibition returns to Istanbul, bringing together over 90 international brands, experts, and enthusiasts in a unique event celebrating luxury, innovation, and global fragrance culture.

hero2.label: PERFUME EXPO
hero2.title1: The Art of Fragrance in Istanbul
hero2.desc1: The Fragrance Expo returns to Istanbul after more than 20 years, bringing together perfume creators, brands, and experts from around the world. With its strategic location and global importance, Istanbul offers the perfect environment for innovation, business, and luxury experiences. More than 90 exhibitors and sponsors will showcase the latest trends in perfumery, creating a unique event that blends elegance, creativity, and networking opportunities.
ticks: Global gathering of perfume brands and experts
hero2.desc2: The Fragrance Expo takes place at WOW Hotel Istanbul across a space exceeding 1400 m², bringing together more than 90 exhibitors and sponsors from around the world in a refined professional environment. The event features interactive activities and unique experiences, offering an exceptional opportunity for fragrance professionals and enthusiasts to build partnerships and discover the latest innovations.

features.title: Luxury Atmosphere
features.desc: A refined environment blending elegance and creativity.

features.title: Strategic Location
features.desc: Hosted in Istanbul, a global hub for business and tourism.

features.desc: International brands, experts, and perfume creators.

footer.desc: Discover a unique experience in the world of perfumes. Elegance, luxury, and quality combined to offer you the best.
footer.newsDesc: Subscribe to receive the latest offers and updates.

about2.desc: The Fragrance Expo returns to Istanbul after more than 20 years. Discover global perfume brands, experts, and the latest innovations. Explore a world of luxury, creativity, and new opportunities.

card1.title: Perfume Bazaar

card2.title: Create Your Perfume

card4.title: Perfume Studio

finalAbout.desc1: Step into a world where every scent tells a story and every note awakens emotion. Our exhibition in Istanbul is more than an event — it is a destination where creativity, luxury, and innovation meet to redefine the art of perfumery.
finalAbout.desc2: Whether you are a brand, a creator, or a passionate enthusiast, this is your opportunity to explore rare compositions, connect with global experts, and experience fragrance in its most refined form.

heroBanner.desc: Step into a refined world where scent becomes art and elegance defines every moment.

blog.title2: A Unique Fragrance Experience with Global Participation
blog.title3: Expanding Opportunities in the Fragrance Industry
blog.desc1: The international Perfume Expo Istanbul will take place from July 8 to 10, 2026, bringing together the global fragrance industry in one of the world's leading business and tourism hubs.
blog.desc2: Held at WOW Istanbul Hotel over 1400 m², the expo will host 90+ international exhibitors and welcome over 10,000 visitors, offering interactive experiences and strong business opportunities.
blog.desc3: Organized by Aşk Istanbul under the leadership of SEMIRE SARHAN, the event creates a powerful platform for networking, innovation, and growth in the global perfume market.

blogDetail.title2: A Unique Fragrance Experience with Global Participation
blogDetail.title3: Expanding Opportunities in the Fragrance Industry
blogDetail.desc1: The international Perfume Expo Istanbul will take place from July 8 to 10, 2026, bringing together global perfume brands, experts, and innovators in one of the world’s most dynamic cities.
blogDetail.desc2: Hosted at WOW Istanbul Hotel across more than 1400 m², the expo will feature over 90 international exhibitors and welcome thousands of visitors with immersive fragrance experiences.
blogDetail.desc3: Organized by Aşk Istanbul under the leadership of SEMIRE SARHAN, the event creates powerful opportunities for networking, innovation, and growth in the global perfume industry.
blogDetail.point1Desc: Discover premium perfumes crafted by international experts.
blogDetail.point2Desc: Connect with brands, creators, and distributors worldwide.
blogDetail.point3Desc: Explore the latest trends shaping the future of perfumery.
blogDetail.extra: This exhibition offers a unique opportunity to explore the world of fragrance, combining elegance, creativity, and business opportunities in one unforgettable experience.

contact.title: Get in touch with our team anytime today
